body.title: EF questions tree — seed 4 missing nodes + facia
body.result: Seeded EF_FACIA + EF_Q1-Q4 as INTERPRETIVE nodes in Postgres. EF_FACIA parented to CP1. Four questions: (1) What does it mean to me? (2) What does that mean? (3) How must that work? (4) What is the first thing I say in response to that? All include D276 persistence-hunting context. seed_ef_questions_tree.py created for repeatability.
body.description: Seed 4 missing EF questions as INTERPRETIVE nodes (same cluster style as 755182-755190): What does it mean to me?, What does that mean?, How must that work?, What is the first thing I say in response to that? Add EF tree facia node. Part of D272 boredom idle loop.
